invenio_app_rdm.This community has no subcommunities: This collection has no child collections

invenio_communities.Changing your community's unique identif: Changing your collection's unique identifier can have unintended side effects.
invenio_communities.Controls if anyone can request to join y: Controls if anyone can request to join your collection.
invenio_communities.Controls if the community is visible to: Controls if the collection is visible to anyone or to members only.
invenio_communities.Controls who can submit records to the c: Controls who can submit records to the collection.
invenio_communities.Do you already have an existing communit: Do you already have an existing collection?
invenio_communities.New unique identifier of the community: New unique identifier of the collection
invenio_communities.Note: upon addition, selected groups wil: Note: upon addition, selected groups will become collection members immediately without any kind of notification or invitation approval.
invenio_communities.Submission to this community does not re: Submission to this collection does not require review, and will be published immediately.
invenio_communities.Submission to this community is only all: Submission to this collection is only allowed to collection members.

invenio_communities.Your community membership is only visibl: Your collection membership is only visible to other members of the collection.

invenio_modular_deposit_form.Before publishing to the community, plea: Before publishing to the collection, please read and check the following:
invenio_modular_deposit_form.Did not find a community that fits you?: Did not find a collection that fits you? Upload without a collection or <2>create your own.</2>
invenio_modular_deposit_form.If your upload is accepted by the commun: If your upload is accepted by the collection curators, it will be <bold>immediately published</bold>. Before that, you will still be able to modify metadata and files of this upload.
invenio_modular_deposit_form.Submission to this community does not re: Submission to this collection does not require review, and will be published immediately.

invenio_modular_detail_page.An error occurred while fetching communi: An error occurred while fetching collections.

invenio_rdm_records.Before publishing to the community, plea: Before publishing to the collection, please read and check the following:
invenio_rdm_records.Before submitting to community, please r: Before submitting to collection, please read and check the following:
invenio_rdm_records.Community curators will review your uplo: Collection curators will review your upload. Once accepted, it will be published.
invenio_rdm_records.If your upload is accepted by the commun: If your upload is accepted by the collection curators, it will be <bold>immediately published</bold>. Before that, you will still be able to modify metadata and files of this upload.
invenio_rdm_records.Once your upload is complete, you can pu: Once your upload is complete, you can publish or submit it for review to the collection curators.
invenio_rdm_records.Once your upload is complete, you can su: Once your upload is complete, you can submit it for review to the collection curators.
invenio_rdm_records.Select the community where you want to s: Select the collection where you want to submit your record.
invenio_rdm_records.Submission to this community is only all: Submission to this collection is only allowed by dedicated upload form. Use the button to jump to the form.
Submission to this collection is only allowed if the record is restricted.
Submission to this collection is only allowed to collection members.
invenio_rdm_records.The request to submit this upload to the: The request to submit this upload to the collection has expired.
The request to submit this upload to the collection was declined.
